description: Provide clangd language intelligence for C and C++ projects in DotCraft.

interface.shortDescription: Enable clangd for C and C++ projects
interface.longDescription: C/C++ LSP connects DotCraft's LSP tools to clangd so agents can inspect definitions, references, symbols, and call relationships in C and C++ workspaces.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up C/C++ language intelligence for this workspace.
